product_overview: AgriAsset 2025 is a comprehensive agricultural management platform combining farm operations, crop and tree inventory management, cost accounting, and advanced analytics with offline-support progressive web app capabilities. It integrates a React-based frontend with a Django REST Framework backend, secured with role-based access control and Row Level Security, aiming at improving farm productivity, operational decision-making, and financial risk awareness.
core_goals: Provide an intuitive and responsive dashboard with key performance indicators and trends.
Enable robust daily agricultural activity logging with offline support and team/material tracking.
Manage crop plans, tasks, and associated products/services comprehensively.
Offer detailed tree inventory management with service coverage and event tracking to ensure orchard health.
Facilitate inventory and stock management with alerting on reorder thresholds.
Implement secure user authentication and farm-specific access control enforcing data isolation.
Deliver advanced reporting and anomaly detection features, including Financial Risk Zone analytics for cost anomalies.
Support offline data entry and synchronization to ensure continuous usability in field conditions.
Maintain high system reliability and data integrity through database migrations, RLS enforcement, and comprehensive automated tests.
key_features: Executive dashboard featuring KPI cards, cost trends, and activity metrics with modern glassmorphism UI design.
Daily logging system with forms supporting task, team, material inputs, and offline queuing.
Tree inventory tracking categorized by tree statuses with event logging for planting, harvest, and loss.
Crop management including crop cards, seasonal plans, and task management with product linking.
Sales module for creating and tracking agricultural product invoices.
Stock and materials inventory management with stock movement recording and reorder alerts.
Comprehensive reporting portal with export to Excel and advanced financial anomaly detection.
User authentication with farm membership roles and permission enforcement using Row Level Security.
Offline queue mechanism utilizing IndexedDB and service workers, enabling data caching and retry logic for request sync.
Extensive backend API with a single entrypoint for maintaining consistency and security.
Support for unit conversions, crop templates, and resource analytics to enhance inventory and cost tracking.
user_flow_summary: Users authenticate via secure login to access farms assigned per their memberships.
From the dashboard, users view aggregated KPIs and trends for selected farms.
Users create daily logs by selecting farm, date, tasks, crop plans, and adding activity details, with support for offline saving and queued upload.
Crop managers navigate crop cards and plans to assign tasks, link products, and monitor seasonal activities.
Tree inventory managers update tree stock with event logs for planting, harvest, loss, and adjustments.
Inventory managers record stock movements and review inventory balances with alerts for reorder.
Report users generate filtered reports, review cost variances and anomalies in the Financial Risk Zone, and export reports.
System admins perform migrations, verify RLS policies, create superusers, and monitor deployments for production readiness.
Offline queued requests and attachments are periodically retried in background, with UI feedback on synchronization status.
validation_criteria: Dashboard displays accurate KPIs and charts reflecting live farm data.
Daily logs save correctly in both online and offline modes with attachments syncing.
User role and farm access permissions enforce strict data isolation via RLS in the database.
All migrations including RLS policy scripts (0093, 0094) apply cleanly without errors.
Financial Risk Zone identifies cost anomalies with correct statistical calculations and flags.
API endpoints respond properly with authentication enforced and error handling.
Frontend offline queue persists requests and attachments, successfully flushing them when online.
All automated tests for RLS policies, middleware, and financial ledger isolation pass without failures.
Deployment steps perform clean setup including environment variables, secrets, migrations, static collection, and security checks.
User interface flows match documented wireframes and support usability on desktop and mobile devices.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Executive dashboard with KPI cards, charts for cost trends, plan status distribution, and activity metrics. Premium glassmorphism design.

features.name: DailyLog
features.description: Daily work logging system for agricultural activities. Includes form for logging tasks, team management, materials tracking, and offline queue support.

features.name: TreeInventory
features.description: Tree inventory management with filtering, summary statistics, and event logging. Tracks tree counts by status (productive, declining).

features.name: Sales
features.description: Sales invoice management module for creating and tracking agricultural product sales.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User authentication with login, permissions, and farm access control.

features.name: Reports
features.description: Reporting and analytics for farm operations, costs, and activities.

features.name: Farms
features.description: Farm management including farm details and location management.

features.name: CropManagement
features.description: Crop planning, crop cards, and task management for agricultural operations.

features.name: APIClient
features.description: Centralized API client for all backend communication.
